profiles.name: 1 2 3 (Al Alamiah) (1986) [Arabic MSX] [a].rom

profiles.name: 1 2 3 (Al Alamiah) (1986) [Arabic MSX] [a].rom

profiles.name: a_test2 [Arabic MSX].rom
profiles.reason: Arabic educational cartridge depends on the BR C-BIOS MSX2 main ROM metadata; the generic MSX2 C-BIOS leaves display blanked with R#1 bit 6 clear

profiles.name: BARBARIAN.rom

profiles.name: Believe It or Not (Al Alamiah) (1990) [Arabic MSX].rom
profiles.reason: C-BIOS MSX1 stays on the startup banner for this padded Arabic cartridge image; validate the C-BIOS-visible path through the MSX2 plain profile

profiles.name: Believe It or Not (Al Alamiah) (1990) [Arabic MSX].rom
profiles.reason: 64 KiB padded plain image has its cartridge header at file offset $4000; the shared MSX loader maps that payload at the cartridge window

profiles.name: bean.rom
profiles.reason: Tracked MSX2 parity blocker: C-BIOS MSX2 reaches Bean's $BFFF->$C000 handoff then falls into the known PC=$CA3E bad state
